title: The home learning environment and attainment
body: "This report examines how young people’s attainment of level 2 and level 3 qualifications at the age of 19 is linked to their:   socioeconomic background behaviour relationship with parents and carers perceptions of safety   It is based on matched survey and administrative data from the longitudinal study of young people in England 2 and the national pupil database.  The appendix has detailed tables that support the findings and analysis in the report. "

taxons.title: Secondary curriculum, key stage 3 and key stage 4 (GCSEs)
